title: CTO, AI & Software Engineer (Founding Engineer)
description: Leading the technical vision and development as a founding engineer, focusing on AI and software engineering. Architecting scalable systems for AI-powered healthcare solutions and driving innovation in medical technology.
achievements: Leading technical architecture for AI healthcare platform
Building founding engineering team and tech culture
Implementing machine learning pipelines for medical data processing

title: Software Engineer
description: Designed and developed a reusable React component library, reducing development time for subsequent projects. Demonstrated strong problem-solving skills by resolving complex UI issues and optimizing database queries.
achievements: Created reusable React component library reducing dev time by 30%
Resolved complex UI issues, increasing user task completion by 20%
Optimized database queries reducing backend response times by 30%
Mentored junior developers on best practices

title: Frontend Developer
description: Crafted single-page applications for brands, improving user engagement and conversion. Conducted performance profiling, optimizations, and integrated third-party APIs.
achievements: Increased user engagement and conversion rate by 3%
Integrated multiple third-party APIs expanding service offerings
Led code reviews ensuring quality standards

title: Frontend Developer
description: Collaborated with cross-functional teams to produce streamlined workflows and improvements. Conducted code reviews and refactoring, reducing bugs while creating responsive interfaces.
achievements: Reduced bugs and errors by 3% through rigorous code reviews
Collaborated with designers on UX improvements
